path: PNGS/Cursing Ali is cursing Aqa ﷺ.jpg
text: hakim:4616 - Abii Jafar Ahmad b. ‘Ubayd al-Hafiz Bihamdan > Ahmad b. Maisa b. Ishaq al-Taymi > Jandal b. And al-q > Bukayr b. ‘Uthman al-Bajali > Ab Ishaq al- Tamimi > Aba ‘Abdullah al-Jadali > Hajajt [Machine] I heard Abu Abdullah Al-Jadali say, "I performed Hajj when [ was young, so I passed by the city and saw the people gathered in one place. I followed them and they entered the house of Umm Salamah, the wife of the Prophet #£ . I heard her say, '0 Shabib ibn Rib'i, a man with a sharp and dry tongue answered her, 'Here I am, O my mother." She said, 'Did the Messenger of Allah & curse in your gathering?' He said, 'How is that?' She said, 'Ali ibn Abi Talib said, 'We say things that we desire worldly gain.' She continued, 'T heard the Messenger of Allah £ say, 'Whoever curses Ali has cursed me, and whoever curses me has cursed Allah the Exalted." @ - Remains Silent (Dhahabi)
